---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve Zenith
title: "[BUG] : "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

### Description
> A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

### Expected Behavior
> A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

### Screenshots
> If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

### Device Information
- **Device:** [e.g. Pixel 6]
- **OS:** [e.g. Android 13]
- **App Version:** [e.g. v1.0.0]

### Additional Context
> Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., logs from Logcat).

---
### Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this bug has not been reported yet.
- [ ] I am using the latest version of the app.
